title: B3. Ambiguity Detection (Pronoun Disambiguation)
label: mx1_transmute_07
task_text:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: architecture-derived-B3-ambiguity-detection-pronoun-disambiguation
Title: B3. Ambiguity Detection (Pronoun Disambiguation)

Problem:
"The investigator wanted to interview the witness in person but he was too late. On his way, he got stuck in traffic."

Which option correctly explains the pronoun antecedent?

Answer choices: 5 options.

Grading target:
Exact match on the single letter.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
root_result_excerpt:
Extracted linguistic components for ambiguity analysis.
node_root_helper_01 (transmuted_child): Primary text: The investigator wanted to interview the witness in person but he was too late. On his way, he got stuck in traffic. Entities: The investigator, the witness. Linguistic problem: Pronoun disambiguation and ambiguity detection regarding the pronouns he and his. The task is to determine which
final_result_excerpt:
FINAL_ANSWER: Not provided
JUSTIFICATION: The question lacks the five answer choices to select from.
